description: Simon Webb CBE, FICE, specialises in major programmes and strategic change. An Executive Director at Nichols Group, he has led their work on nuclear decommissioning and warships for the last 10 years, at sites in England, Scotland and Wales. Simon was a non-executive Director of the Major Projects Association from 2010 to 2021. He is a member of the United Nations Economic Commission for Europe’s Group of Experts on Risk Management in Regulatory Systems. Previously Simon was a Director-General in the Department of Transport and the Ministry of Defence, responsible for major projects and security policy. Appointed: January 2022 Term ends: January 2025 Reappointed: January 2025 Term ends: January 2029

details.body:
Simon Webb CBE, FICE, specialises in major programmes and strategic change.

An Executive Director at Nichols Group, he has led their work on nuclear decommissioning and warships for the last 10 years, at sites in England, Scotland and Wales. Simon was a non-executive Director of the Major Projects Association from 2010 to 2021. He is a member of the United Nations Economic Commission for Europe’s Group of Experts on Risk Management in Regulatory Systems.

Previously Simon was a Director-General in the Department of Transport and the Ministry of Defence, responsible for major projects and security policy.

Appointed: January 2022
Term ends: January 2025

Reappointed: January 2025
Term ends: January 2029

title: Simon Webb
